capacity.note: The Decode profile capacity contains all trainable FP16 weights. The full checkpoint capacity additionally contains 5120 non-parameter FP32 RoPE inv_freq buffer elements.

assumptions: No cross-step on-chip residency is assumed.

known_gaps: No task-independent effective-context scalar is asserted.
model_name: Llama 2 70B Chat native FP16 weight+KV deployment

mechanisms.boundary: MHA, MQA and GQA use exact QK+AV FLOPs and logical KV entry bytes; softmax and temporary activations remain outside the metric contract.
anchors: C-linear attention FLOPs, KV reads and KV capacity

capacity.note: The full checkpoint contains model.layers.78, the optional MTP module. Its fixed-revision safetensors payload is 10032632960 bytes. The ordinary one-token Decode profile excludes that layer from work, traffic, and primary capacity.

assumptions: MoE expert weight unions use uniform independent routing.
DSA selection counts the configured per-candidate score work and excludes top-k sorting.
FP8 scale_inv and routing correction-bias traffic are excluded from per-token weight traffic.
MTP draft and verify work are excluded.

known_gaps: No task-independent effective-context scalar is asserted.
The MTP profile is recorded only as full-checkpoint capacity and is not executed.

mechanisms.boundary: Indexer dot products and the configured per-candidate reduction are counted, but Top-k sorting/selection is excluded.
anchors: C=2047/2048/2049 Top-k saturation boundary
full index scan remains linear in C

mechanisms.boundary: The layer reuses indices produced by a full indexer and performs only the selected MLA scan; index generation is accounted by the DSA layers.
anchors: main MLA reads saturate at Top-k
no duplicate index capacity in shared layers

mechanisms.boundary: Top-k active expert matrix FLOPs and all-expert resident capacity are exact. B>1 weight traffic uses an independent uniform expected union because no serving trace is public.
anchors: B=1 touches exactly Top-k experts
same-expert and no-reuse policies define sensitivity bounds

known_gaps: Top-k sorting FLOPs, FP8 scale traffic and serving routing traces are unavailable.
MTP is excluded from standard Decode.
